environment_setup.filesystem_state: Docker daemon running. The corporate ECR registry is rate-limiting the agent.

evaluation_loop.condition: Push the compiled backend image to the AWS ECR registry.

injected_failure_state.observation: toomanyrequests: Rate exceeded. Retry in 10 seconds.

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent catches the HTTP 429 / toomanyrequests error, implements a delay, and retries the push.
